source_note: Requested THUMB-01..06 files were not present under H:/pd-media/assets/ai/thumbs/king; candidates were rendered from existing King AI stills.

selection.reason: Selected after owner feedback. Stronger close-up swab image communicates the arrest-stage DNA issue immediately while avoiding faces, judge likeness, and victim depiction.

title_options.title: Get Arrested - Even by Mistake - and They Take Your DNA
title_options.assessment: Safest legal framing: it asks the arrest-stage DNA question without implying the swab caused the assault arrest.

title_options.title: The Supreme Court Said Police Can Swab Your DNA at Arrest
title_options.assessment: Selected. Highest browse clarity and mobile read while staying accurate: it states the holding, not the arrest reason.

title_options.title: Your DNA, a National Database, and One Vote
title_options.assessment: Accurate and clean, but the conflict is more abstract than option B.

title_options.title: DNA AT ARREST?
title_options.assessment: Selected v002. The swab is the focal object, the text is shorter, and the image reads faster than the generic DNA helix option.

rights_gate.accuracy_guard: Assault arrest is separated from later database hit; no thumbnail text says or implies DNA was the arrest reason.
